## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Player-Facing Impact

- what a player will notice
- what lessons, maps, battles, or UI flows were affected

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run build:assets` if sprite or palette data changed
- [ ] `npm run build:readme-media` if README preview media changed
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] manual checks from `TESTING.md` for gameplay or UI changes

## Media

- screenshots or GIFs for visible UI/gameplay changes

## Notes

- generated files updated, if any
- follow-up work or known limitations, if any
